calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Defendant appearing in pro per, plaintiff represented by and through Gerard Mendez, Esq. Cause settled this day. Terms of stipulated judgment memorialized per the record. Counsel to prepare and serve order. Trial date is vacated.
